title: Senior Product Executive
description:
Why Join Flexxon

At Flexxon, we cultivate a culture of innovation, creativity, and inclusivity. You will work alongside passionate professionals in a dynamic, supportive environment that values growth, ownership, and results. This role offers the opportunity to make a meaningful impact by shaping next-generation security storage solutions used across global industries.

Role Overview

We are looking for a Senior Product Executive to lead the development, positioning, and go-to-market strategy of Flexxon’s security product portfolio, covering data integrity, access control, authentication, encryption, and secure storage solutions across removable media and solid-state devices. Oversee the development, positioning, and go-to-market strategy of Flexxon’s security product portfolio, encompassing data integrity, access control, authentication, data protection, and encryption-based storage solutions across removable media and solid-state devices.

If you are excited about the prospect of taking on new challenges, making an impact, and contributing to the success of our products, we would love to hear from you.

Key Responsibilities

  1. Drive product lifecycle management, including Fixed BOM solutions, product qualification, and reliability testing

  2. Partner with engineering, procurement, and sales teams to ensure product consistency, quality, and long lifecycle planning

  3. Support market analysis, demand forecasting, and product customization to meet diverse customer needs

  4. Manage product documentation, including datasheets and technical manuals for global teams and partners

  5. Provide client consultation and technical support for specialized industries such as industrial, medical, and automotive sectors.

What We’re Looking For

  • Foundational knowledge of NAND flash storage technologies (PCIe, SATA, PATA, USB, eMMC)

  • Ability to translate customer requirements into tailored storage solutions

  • Strong communication and collaboration skills to work effectively with global cross-functional teams

  • Proficiency in leveraging AI-powered tools to enhance analysis, decision-making, documentation, and workflow efficiency

postedCompany.description:
Flexxon provides specialized design-in services worldwide supply chain solutions for Flash-based storage solutions - NAND Solution Products; serving specifically the INDUSTRIAL, MEDICAL & AUTOMOTIVE (IMA) sectors.

Collaboration with World NAND Solution Technology leader and provider, Flexxon offer leading edge Flash-based storage products with exceptional performance and outstanding reliability.

Flexxon Flash-based storage product range:

  • SSD
  • NAND Flash Modules
  • Storage Cards
  • Drive with variety of interfaces support.
  • Special capacity and customized features according to customer requirement
postedCompany.name: FLEXXON PTE. LTD.
